title: Rat Mod
description: A fabric mod that adds rats, cheese, and more into minecraft
body:
# RatMod

Rat Mod is a Minecraft Fabric mod made for 1.21.4

Rat Mod adds features like Rats, Cheese, and more rat related features in game!

Features:
- Rats spawn naturally in dark areas and caves
- Rats will walk to and stay near cheese blocks 
- Rats can be bred using cheese


## Credits:
- Cheese + cheese_block_top_bottom textures: mountainshaper (discord)
- Rat texture: https://minecraft.novaskin.me/post/3588823282/mousey
